mapper.select: SELECT MOVIE_ID , POSTER_URL , TITLE , MOVIE_RATING , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPEN_DATE , OPEN_COUNTRY , RUNNING_TIME , INTRODUCE , SYSNOPSIS , ORIGINAL_TITLE , STATE , LANGUAGE , BUDGET , PROFIT FROM MOVIE

SELECT MOVIE_ID , POSTER_URL , TITLE , MOVIE_RATING , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPEN_DATE , OPEN_COUNTRY , RUNNING_TIME , INTRODUCE , SYSNOPSIS , ORIGINAL_TITLE , STATE , LANGUAGE , BUDGET , PROFIT FROM MOVIE WHERE MOVIE_ID = #{_parameter}
